goal: Find a reliable, cheaper morning commute with occasional late returns.
constraints: Bus service is unreliable and overcrowded during peak times.
Commute time is unpredictable due to traffic.
Parking costs and time spent walking from parking to the office.
Daycare drop-off constraints create a fixed morning window; cannot shift commute drastically.
Safety concerns with biking during low light on weekdays; perceived unsafe infrastructure.
Rideshare costs significantly affect the monthly budget; explore cheaper options or subsidies.
Late-night commutes may require rideshares; prefer alternatives when safe and cheaper.
Workplace commuting subsidy reduces driving costs; include subsidy when comparing driving versus other options.
Theft risk for cycling/scooters at work; require secure storage options and policies.
On-site charging policies may restrict unattended charging; prefer removable batteries and designated outlets.
Avoid the short busy road before the highway; prioritize routes through quieter residential streets.
decisions: Establish carpool etiquette and backup plan with designated backup drivers and cost-sharing rules.
entities: Waterproof shell and overshoes or rain pants
Puncture-resistant tires or liners + quality tubes
open: Draft a carpool agreement (one paragraph) to formalize etiquette and backup plan.
Would you like me to rank the options by cost, fastest, or safest?
Would you rather prioritize options that involve employer support (shuttle, taxi vouchers) or independent arrangements?
